Gear engaged default identificationAccel pedal depressed beyond mechanical hard pointEngine control request for speed limiter system deactivationEngine control request for speed limiter abnormal deactivationEngine control request for cruise control system deactivationEngine control request for cruise control abnormal deactivationBraking detected for cruise controlSudden braking detected for cruise controlState of the steering wheel buttons : not filtered - vCOMDTMPInput of the cruise control main switch - fRVONInput of the speed limiter main switch - fLVONACC frame presence detection with security on configuration detectionDetect the cruise control switch connection. Stored in E2PROM_fCNXRVSWDetect cruise control option with security on configuration detection. Stored in E2PROM_fCNXRVDetect the speed limiter switch connection. Stored in E2PROM_fCNSLVSWSteering wheel switches connection detection. Stored in E2PROM_fFCNXBTVSpeed limiter option with security on configuration detection. Stored in E2PROM_fCNXLVDetect the speed distance limiter option. Stored in E2PROM_fCNXSDLBoolean for wired brake connectionBegin stroke clutch switch connection detection. Stored in E2PROMWired open active brake switch inputState of the begin stroke clutch pedal. Physical input.Displayed vehicle speedCompilation of all the cru/sl normal deactivations due to system causes. Saved in E2PROMCompilation of all the cru/sl normal causes of deactivationTransmission ratio for manual gearbox calculated by the engine control unitDetected failure : CCSL Steering Wheel Command Switched blocked buttonDetected failure : Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch invalid valueDetected failure : Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch open circuitDetected failure : Cruise Control Main Switch CoherenceThe vehicle speed used for CC/SL is in mphDisplayed vehicle speed received on the CAN network not availableIn manual gearbox the reverse position is engagedVehicle speed received on the CAN network not availableAutomatic or manual parking braking detectedGearbox is on the neutral position (information from CAN)The automatic gearbox transmits a limphome or invalid or unexpected gear valueThe automatic gearbox is on reverse positionThe automatic gearbox is on neutral positionThe automatic gearbox is not coupled to the engineThe clutch pedal status information is unavailableState of the clutch pedalThe brake status information is absentBraking detected with the brake switchesCounter : increment at each START button pushRequested SpeedCarrier of all the failures which cause CC failureCCSL_Status of the reversible failure_vCCSLFALMaximum duration of RESUME button pressMaximum duration of SET+ button pressMaximum duration of SET- button pressMaximum duration of SUSPEND button pressMaximum value of counter for detection of blocked button.
